5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5611.issue: [W5611] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/_advanced/items/sensors/items[1]/options[1]" attribute "label" is missing language(s) "uk" in i18n object.

6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.luftdaten/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.

6024.issue: [W6024] [README.md](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.luftdaten/blob/master/README.md) contains the Sentry information, but it is located too far down in the document. Please move it near the top of README.

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.luftdaten/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.3" at [package.json](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.luftdaten/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
